reply.text: Quick question, why are you single

messages.text: bold question for a city glow villain like you
im just scouting if youre worth chaos
loud is fine, wrong would hurt more, answer the question
understandable, but statistically im a refund
your story said city glow, not city settle
dont let this be all talk
